Incident coordination infrastructure for Indian trucking fleets.

AASIOM builds structured workflows for high-friction transport operations. Our first product, ANVIRA, helps trucking fleets turn driver alerts, WhatsApp updates, photos, location, documents, severity status, evidence gaps, downtime blockers, and follow-up actions into one controlled incident case file.

Incident Case File
THE PROBLEM

The first 30 minutes after a trucking incident can decide how clear or chaotic the entire follow-up becomes.

Driver calls are unclear. Photos arrive scattered. Documents are incomplete. Follow-up actions live in memory. What should become one incident record becomes a chain of calls, chats, and missed context.

Unclear First Report

Hover / tap →
01

Driver calls are often incomplete, emotional, or missing key details.

Scattered Evidence

Hover / tap →
02

Photos, location, documents, and updates remain spread across WhatsApp and calls.

No Single Case File

Hover / tap →
03

Owners, managers, surveyors, and internal teams work from different information.

Downtime Blind Spots

Hover / tap →
04

Repair, cargo, route, and follow-up blockers are not tracked in one place.

WHAT AASIOM BUILDS

AASIOM turns scattered incident communication into structured operational records.

We design practical systems that help transport operators capture field information, coordinate follow-up, preserve evidence, and maintain accountability during high-pressure incidents.

Report

Driver sends first alert through WhatsApp-style intake.

Verify

Fleet team confirms severity, location, vehicle, and driver status.

Document

Photos, documents, timestamps, and context are collected.

Coordinate

Owners assign next actions and track blockers.

Record

ANVIRA generates a structured case file and evidence dossier.

FLAGSHIP PLATFORM

ANVIRA is the incident command layer for highway fleet operations.

Built to help transport operators manage the critical window during and after highway incidents — from first report to verified record pack.

What ANVIRA coordinates
✦ Capture incident reports through guided WhatsApp-style flows
⌁ Collect photos, location, documents, timestamps, and driver updates
↗ Track severity, evidence status, next actions, and downtime blockers
◈ Alert teams when cargo continuity may be at risk
◈ Generate a structured evidence dossier for internal review and claim-readiness

ANVIRA supports coordination and documentation. It does not replace emergency services, police, ambulance, towing, repair, or insurance decision-making.

Fleet pilot stage Human review Auditable record

TRUST & OPERATIONS

Built for controlled incident handling, not blind automation.

AASIOM systems are designed around human review, auditable records, controlled access, and practical deployment in Indian operating conditions.
